description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/role_unit/role_unit_containers:build with a docker:dind service. Define a single job named single_debian10 that runs in the default test stage, extends a .test_template and executes the script RU_ENV_IMAGE=${CI_JOB_NAME/*_/} tests/bash_unit tests/tests_ROLE_NAME. Set the variables DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, and STORAGE_DRIVER=vfs for this job. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
